payload.label: window
payload.short_description: dark reflective window with lamp reflection
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark glass window pane showing strong interior reflections — a bright lamp glare and vertical blind-like stripe reflections are visible on a glossy, slightly blurred surface, with a dark frame along the right edge; appears to be about 1.5 m from the camera.
